description: Codebase hardening — fix bugs, improve error handling, add test coverage

userStories.title: Fix bugs in agentmd and deps packages
userStories.description: Fix os.IsNotExist too narrow in agentmd, empty cli.Exit message, and silent strconv.Atoi skip in deps.
acceptanceCriteria: agentmd/commands.go: os.Stat checks err != nil (not just IsNotExist)
agentmd/commands.go: cli.Exit includes descriptive error message
deps/commands.go: buildLayerMap logs warning for non-numeric layer keys
Lint passes (just lint)
Build passes (go build ./...)

userStories.title: Improve error handling in worktree package
userStories.description: Stop swallowing errors in worktree cleanup operations; add context timeouts to exec calls.
acceptanceCriteria: commands.go runNuke: log DeleteBranch and Prune errors to stderr instead of discarding
tui.go deleteSelectedCmd: collect and surface errors as toast messages
All exec.CommandContext calls use a 30s timeout context instead of context.Background()
Lint passes (just lint)
Build passes (go build ./...)

userStories.title: Add unit tests for internal/config
userStories.description: Add tests for config loading, directory walk-up, and TOML parsing.
acceptanceCriteria: config_test.go with tests for Load() happy path, missing file, and invalid TOML
Tests pass with race detector (just test)
Lint passes (just lint)

userStories.title: Add unit tests for internal/deps
userStories.description: Add tests for buildLayerMap, parseCrateDeps, and violation detection logic.
acceptanceCriteria: deps_test.go with tests for buildLayerMap, parseCrateDeps, and findWorkspaceRoot
Tests cover: valid layers, invalid keys, empty deps, dependency extraction
Tests pass with race detector (just test)
Lint passes (just lint)

userStories.title: Add unit tests for internal/agentmd
userStories.description: Add tests for AGENT.md presence checking logic.
acceptanceCriteria: agentmd_test.go with tests for runCheck: all present, some missing, empty dir
Tests pass with race detector (just test)
Lint passes (just lint)

userStories.title: Add unit tests for internal/worktree/git.go
userStories.description: Add tests for pure functions: dirSize, isSameOrChild, lastActiveTime, classifyEntry.
acceptanceCriteria: git_test.go with tests for dirSize, isSameOrChild, lastActiveTime
Tests pass with race detector (just test)
Lint passes (just lint)
